title: D3.7 - PROTOCOL FOR IMPLEMENT STUDY
author: Ferrara, Lucia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This deliverable describes the protocol of the IMPLEMENT study that will be submitted to the relevant authorities for approval. Specifically, this document explains the background, rationale, objectives and methods that will be adopted to conduct the IMPLEMENT Study.
